stage_identity.evidence: Teen stage anchor used as reference image alongside live base. Gangly teen Byte form with big expressive eyes requested in prompt; multi-image input preserves teen silhouette and proportions from canonical stage_images/teen.png.

pixel_style.evidence: Prompt specifies 'pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette'. Model: flux2Flash with guidance 0.5 applied to existing pixel-art base. Output file size 328KB is consistent with pixel-art style rendering.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Prompt requested active typing pose with forward lean in ecstatic coding flow state. Warm afternoon golden light specified. Both changes are incremental (pose shift + lighting warmth) aligned with active coding session after 5 commits.

artifact_free.evidence: Falcon generation completed successfully with no API errors. No garbled text or floating glyphs specified in prompt. Normal guidance_scale=0.5 applied to base image minimizes artifact introduction.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Prompt explicitly specifies: exactly one golden trophy on left of shelf, one green plant on right of shelf, food bowl on floor to right of desk with clear spacing from desk legs. Single instances only. No overlap between bowl and desk structure specified.

anchors_present.evidence: Prompt explicitly anchors desk, oversized laptop, Chicago skyline window in both scene description and background field. Stage anchor (teen.png) provided as second input to reinforce canonical environment layout.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: state.json: time_of_day=afternoon, local_hour=13, mood=ecstatic, is_sleeping=false. Prompt specifies warm golden afternoon sunlight and ecstatic electric flow-state energy. Full match.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Not applicable: mode=normal. No re-grounding performed this run. should_reground=false in state.json.
